creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Hm, I can't reproduce it on a FreeBSD 12 VM, either, only on TrueOS.  I tried upgrading TrueOS"s freetype2 package to 2.9.0 to match FreeBSD 12's, to no avail.  And the error about LucidaSansRegular is red herring; it shows up on FreeBSD 12 too.  Ktrace didn't show any obvious differences between the two systems (though I might have missed something, there's a lot of output).  I'm out of ideas at this point.  Is there any way to tell which font the application thinks it's actually using?
